mapper.select: SELECT subject_id AS subjectId, NAME AS subjectName, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM subject
SELECT subject_id AS subjectId, NAME AS subjectName, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM subject WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE subject SET name = #{subjectName}, description = #{description} WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId};
mapper.select: SELECT se.enrollment_id AS enrollmentId, se.student_id AS studentId, u.name AS studentName, sb.name AS subjectName, se.enrolled_at AS enrolledAt, se.status FROM student_enrollment se INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM lecture WHERE end_date >= CURDATE()) lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON sb.subject_id = lt.subject_id INNER JOIN user u ON se.student_id = u.user_id

SELECT sb.name AS subjectName, st.name AS studentName, p.amount, p.paid_at AS paidAt FROM payment p INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN user st ON se.student_id = st.user_id

SELECT sb.name AS subjectName, st.name AS studentName, st.phone FROM (SELECT * FROM student_enrollment WHERE STATUS = 'CANCLE') se INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN user st ON se.student_id = st.user_id

SELECT se.enrollment_id AS enrollmentId, u.name AS studentName, sb.name AS subjectName, se.status FROM (SELECT * FROM student_enrollment WHERE STATUS IN ('REFUNDWAIT', 'REFUND')) se INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN user u ON se.student_id = u.user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE student_enrollment SET status = 'REFUND' WHERE status = 'REFUNDWAIT' AND enrollment_id = #{enrollmentId}
